134 
SR_CORE_HOUSNG_1_CD 
LABEL: 
Core HRSN Housing 1: Current Living Situation 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) housing – current living situation. 
LONG NAME: SR_CORE_HOUSNG_1_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
VALUES: 
1 = Steady place to live 
2 = Worried lose housing 
3 = No steady housing 
Missing 
COMMENT:
